controls.frameDownloadedNoProject: Frame downloaded — open a project to save it to the media library.
controls.frameDownloadedNotSaved: Frame downloaded, but couldn't save to the media library: {{message}}

monitor.previewOnlyNote: Only affects local playback — exports use the project mix.
monitor.title: Preview audio

stage.emptyDescription: Import media, drag a clip to the timeline, then press Space to preview.

canvasDrop.compoundClipsTimeline: Compound clips still place best on the timeline.
canvasDrop.presetsTimeline: Text and shape presets still place best on the timeline.
canvasDrop.adjustmentLayersTimeline: Adjustment layers apply to the whole frame — place them on the timeline.
canvasDrop.placeLayerDescription: Place this layer at the drop position.
canvasDrop.oneMediaAtATime: Place one media item at a time on the canvas.
canvasDrop.visualLayersOnly: Canvas drop places visual layers only.
canvasDrop.addAtPlayhead: Add this media at the playhead and drop position.
canvasDrop.oneVisualFileAtATime: Canvas drop imports one visual file at a time.
canvasDrop.importAndPlaceDescription: Import this file and place it on the canvas.
canvasDrop.noCompatibleTrack: No unlocked compatible track is available for this drop.
canvasDrop.mediaNoLongerAvailable: Dropped media is no longer available.
canvasDrop.dragDropUnsupported: Drag-drop is not supported in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge.
canvasDrop.dropAudioOnTimeline: Drop audio on the timeline instead.
